Footer.tagline: We build AI agents. Our agents build your software.

CTABand.title: Have something to build?
CTABand.lede: Tell us the brief. We'll come back with a plan, a timeline, and a fixed estimate — usually within two business days.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.blurb: Custom agents that plan, write, and ship software — supervised by a senior engineer at every step.

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.blurb: Production web apps built by our agents and shipped fast, from marketing sites to full platforms.

mobileApps.title: Mobile Apps
mobileApps.blurb: Native iOS and Android apps from one agent workflow — one brief, both platforms.

agentIntegration.title: Agent Integration
agentIntegration.blurb: Wire agents into the tools you already run — CRM, ERP, WhatsApp, and your internal systems.

hero.lede: CraftsAI is an engineering studio in Dhaka. We design custom AI agents that plan, write, and ship your websites, mobile apps, and integrations — every drawing reviewed by a senior engineer.
hero.schematicLabel: Engineering schematic: a brief flows into an AI agent, which produces a website, a mobile app, and an integration

pillars.title: Four ways we put agents to work.
pillars.description: Every engagement runs on the same idea: agents do the heavy lifting, engineers own the outcome.

build.title: Watch a brief become shipped software.
build.description: This is the real shape of a build: the agent plans and writes, the checks run, and nothing ships until an engineer signs off.

notes.label: Agents do
notes.body: Read the brief, plan the work, write code and tests, run the checks, and open the change for review.

notes.label: Engineers do
notes.body: Set the direction, review every diff, own the architecture and the security-sensitive paths.

notes.label: You get
notes.body: Working software in weeks, not months — with a person accountable for what ships.

advantage.title: The same software, drafted differently.
advantage.footnote: Figures are typical ranges for the projects we take on, not a guarantee — every scope is estimated up front, in writing.

projects.name: TaxoMind
projects.outcome: An AI learning platform built on Bloom's Taxonomy for personalized education.

projects.name: FinCoach AI
projects.outcome: An AI financial coach that helps people build better money habits, day by day.

projects.name: MathPhysics
projects.outcome: Interactive math and physics practice for grade 9–12 students.
